hr.discoveryExplanation: Capabilities nedan kommer från registrerade HR / People Operations Business Pack-manifest. Onboarding, uppgiftstilldelning och medarbetaruppdateringar kräver godkännande — Aipify ändrar aldrig lön, avslutar anställningar eller exponerar känsliga hälsouppgifter i Companion runtime.
hr.verifiedProvider: HR-kilden er forberedt eller verifisert for organisasjonen din.
hr.disconnectedProvider: Leverandøradapter er ikke koblet — kun styrt oppdagelse.
hr.unavailableLead: Ingen HR-leverandør matchet denne forespørselen for organisasjonen din.
hr.unavailableExplanation: HR-capabilities oppdages fra registrerte manifest — ingen matchet dette spørsmålet.
hr.externalUnavailableLead: Eksterne HRIS- eller lønnsadapters er ikke koblet for organisasjonen din.
hr.externalUnavailableExplanation: Ingen live ekstern HR-adapter er registrert. Aipify utfører ikke lønnsendringer, oppsigelser eller irreversible tilgangsendringer i Companion runtime.
hr.blockedOperationLead: Denne HR-operasjonen er ikke tilgjengelig i Companion runtime.
hr.blockedOperationExplanation: Lønnsendringer, oppsigelser, sletting av ansatte, helseopplysninger, juridiske beslutninger og irreversible kontendringer er blokkert i denne fasen. Aipify kan forberede reversible oppdateringer — du bestemmer og godkjenner.

hr.entitlementBlocked: HR-capabilities er utilgjengelige mens organisasjonens abonnement er pauset.
hr.privacyNote: Metadata-først people intelligence — sensitive ansatt- og helseopplysninger filtreres og eksponeres aldri uten tillatelse.

integrationStatus.title: Verified Unonight integration
integrationStatus.successIntro: Aipify retrieved live connection metadata from your verified Unonight integration.
integrationStatus.explanation: This answer uses the active read-only Unonight connection for your organization — not general Knowledge Center articles.

card.title: Unonight är ansluten och verifierad
card.supporting: Aipify hämtade denna information direkt från den aktiva skrivskyddade Unonight-integrationen.

integrationStatus.failureLead: ⚠️ Aipify could not retrieve live data from the Unonight integration right now.
integrationStatus.failureRetryStep: Verify the integration under Platform → Integrations, then ask again.
integrationStatus.orgConfirmBlockedNoLiveData: Organisationsbekräftelse är inte tillgänglig eftersom svaret inte använde live integrationsdata.

lastUsed.intro: Den verifierade Unonight-integrationen användes senast {timestamp}. Aipify läste tidpunkten från den aktiva skrivskyddade anslutningen.

scopes.intro: Den verifierade skrivskyddade Unonight-integrationen ger Aipify åtkomst endast till godkänd driftsmetadata.
scopes.notAllowedPrivateMessages: Kan inte läsa privata meddelanden eller konversationer
scopes.notAllowedPayments: Kan inte läsa betalningar, beställningar eller fakturadata
scopes.notAllowedWrite: Kan inte ändra eller skriva data i Unonight

languages.intro: Den verifierade Unonight-integrationen rapporterar dessa språk: {languages}.

sourceTrust.intro: Aipify kontrollerade den verifierade skrivskyddade Unonight-integrationen nu ({checkedAt}). Senast verifierad: {lastVerified}. Senast använd: {lastUsed}. Åtkomsten är skrivskyddad och källan är live integration — inte Knowledge Center-artiklar.

unsupported.title: Medlemsantal finns inte i integrationen
unsupported.intro: Den nuvarande verifierade skrivskyddade Unonight-integrationen exponerar inte live medlemsantal. Aipify gissar inte siffror utanför godkända scopes.

privateDenied.title: Privata meddelanden ligger utanför godkänd åtkomst
privateDenied.intro: Den verifierade skrivskyddade Unonight-integrationen inkluderar inte åtkomst till privata meddelanden eller konversationer. Aipify kan inte hämta eller visa sådan data.

roleDisambiguation.title: Aipify-roller vs Unonight-medlemsroller
roleDisambiguation.intro: Att ändra en teammedlems roll i Unonight skiljer sig från att hantera roller i din Aipify-organisation.
roleDisambiguation.aipifySection: För roller och behörigheter i Aipify-arbetsytan, öppna Organisation → Roller och behörigheter i APP-portalen.
roleDisambiguation.unonightSection: Medlemsroller på Unonight-plattformen hanteras i Unonight. Den verifierade skrivskyddade integrationen låter inte Aipify ändra Unonight-medlemsroller.

failures.integrationNotConnected: No active Unonight integration is configured for this organization.
failures.integrationNotVerified: The Unonight integration exists but is not verified yet.
failures.credentialUnavailable: The stored connection credential is unavailable for a live read.
failures.endpointUnreachable: Unonight did not respond to the live connection check.
failures.providerMismatch: The live response did not match the expected Unonight provider.
failures.organizationMismatch: The live response organization did not match this workspace.
failures.permissionDenied: Your role cannot read live integration credentials for this organization.
failures.responseInvalid: Unonight returned a response that could not be validated safely.

platformSnapshot.title: Live Unonight-plattformsmetadata
platformSnapshot.failureLead: Aipify kunde inte hämta live plattformsmetadata från den verifierade Unonight-integrationen just nu.
platformSnapshot.failureRetryStep: Verifiera att integrationstoken inkluderar platform.metadata.read och fråga igen.
platformSnapshot.failureRetryStepScopeMissing: Verifiera att integrationstoken inkluderar platform.metadata.read och fråga igen.
platformSnapshot.failureRetryStepStatusContract: Aipify tog emot plattformsdata men kunde inte tolka driftsstatusen. Försök igen när kontraktet är reparerat.
platformSnapshot.failureRetryStepGeneric: Försök fråga igen efter att du bekräftat att den verifierade Unonight-integrationen fortfarande är ansluten.
platformSnapshot.orgConfirmBlockedNoLiveData: Organisationsbekräftelse är otillgänglig eftersom svaret inte använde live plattformsmetadata.

card.title: Live Unonight-plattformsögonblicksbild
card.supporting: Aipify hämtade denna plattformsmetadata direkt från den verifierade skrivskyddade Unonight-integrationen.

activeModules.intro: Unonight rapporterar aktiva moduler från den verifierade live-integrationen. Detaljerna visas i kortet nedan.

environmentStatus.intro: Unonight rapporterar miljö {environment} med status {status}. Kontrollerad {checkedAt}.

visibilitySummary.intro: Unonight rapporterar följande plattformsstatus just nu.

fullSnapshot.intro: Unonight rapporterar följande plattformsstatus just nu.

directAnswers.versionMissing: ℹ️ {provider} anger ingen plattformsversion i live-data just nu.

failures.integrationNotConnected: Ingen aktiv Unonight-integration är konfigurerad för denna organisation.
failures.integrationNotVerified: Unonight-integrationen finns men är inte verifierad ännu.
failures.credentialUnavailable: Lagrad anslutningsnyckel är otillgänglig för live-läsning.
failures.organizationMismatch: Organisationen i live-svaret matchade inte denna arbetsyta.
failures.permissionDenied: Din roll kan inte läsa live integrationsnycklar för denna organisation.
failures.responseInvalid: Unonight returnerade plattformsmetadata som inte kunde valideras säkert.
failures.liveScopeMissing: Unonight avvisade live plattformssnapshot eftersom den aktiva token saknar platform.metadata.read.
failures.platformSnapshotForbidden: Unonight avvisade live plattformssnapshot-begäran för denna token.
failures.credentialMismatch: Den lagrade credential-referensen matchar inte den aktiva Unonight-token som användes.
failures.malformedModules: Unonight returnerade plattformsmetadata utan en igenkännbar lista över aktiva offentliga moduler.
failures.malformedLocales: Unonight returnerade plattformsmetadata utan igenkännbara språkkoder.
failures.malformedEnvironment: Unonight returnerade plattformsmetadata med ett oigenkännligt miljövärde.
failures.malformedOrganization: Unonight returnerade plattformsmetadata med ett ofullständigt organisationsblock.
failures.statusUnavailable: Unonight returnerade plattformsmetadata utan igenkännbar tillgänglighetsstatus.
failures.unsupportedContractVersion: Unonight returnerade en API-version för plattformssnapshot som inte stöds.
failures.unsafePayload: Unonight returnerade plattformsmetadata med fält som inte är tillåtna i denna skrivskyddade snapshot.

fallback.directAnswer: Aipify can guide you through the APP portal — navigation, billing, team, security, integrations, and support.

aipifyOverview.title: What is Aipify?
aipifyOverview.directAnswer: Aipify is your Business Operating System (ABOS) — a single trusted companion that helps your organization operate, decide, and grow from one APP portal.
aipifyOverview.explanation: Aipify works inside your workspace with verified context. You stay in control; Aipify prepares, explains, and recommends next steps.
aipifyOverview.step1: Explore the Command Center for your daily overview.
aipifyOverview.step2: Ask Aipify Companion anytime for guidance with direct links.
aipifyOverview.searchTerms: hva er aipify|what is aipify|what is aipify?|hva er aipify?|about aipify|om aipify

aipifyCapabilities.title: What can Aipify help with?
aipifyCapabilities.directAnswer: Aipify helps with operations, team governance, billing, security, integrations, Business Packs, briefings, and support — all from your APP portal.
aipifyCapabilities.explanation: Companion guidance covers navigation, approvals, notifications, and verified account context. Humans decide; Aipify informs and prepares.
aipifyCapabilities.step1: Open Aipify Companion for contextual guidance on any page.
aipifyCapabilities.step2: Use Command Brief and Since Last Login for executive catch-up.
aipifyCapabilities.searchTerms: hva kan aipify hjelpe|what can aipify help|help me with|hjelpe meg med|capabilities|funksjoner

appPanelNavigation.title: How the APP panel works
appPanelNavigation.directAnswer: The APP portal is organized into Home, Organization, Business Packs, Operations, Intelligence, Billing, Support, Account, and Platform sections in the sidebar.
appPanelNavigation.explanation: Each section maps to real routes in your workspace. Your role and plan determine which pages you can access.
appPanelNavigation.step1: Use the sidebar to navigate between sections.
appPanelNavigation.step2: Open Aipify Companion on any page for page-aware suggestions.
appPanelNavigation.step3: Check Since Last Login under Intelligence for a quick catch-up.
appPanelNavigation.searchTerms: app panel|app-panelet|how does the app|hvordan fungerer app|navigation|sidebar|portal

addTeamMembers.title: Add team members
addTeamMembers.directAnswer: Invite employees from Organization → Team Members. Owners and admins can send invitations and assign initial access.
addTeamMembers.explanation: New members receive access according to your organization's role policy. You can adjust roles afterward under Roles & Permissions.
addTeamMembers.step2: Select Invite member and enter their email.
addTeamMembers.step3: Assign a role and send the invitation.
addTeamMembers.searchTerms: add employee|legge til ansatte|invite team|inviter|team members|medarbeider|ansatte

changeRoles.title: Change roles
changeRoles.directAnswer: Update member roles under Organization → Roles & Permissions. Only owners and admins can change roles.
changeRoles.explanation: Roles control access to billing, team management, integrations, and sensitive settings. Changes are audited.
changeRoles.step2: Select the team member to update.
changeRoles.step3: Choose the new role and save.

upgradeSubscription.title: Upgrade your subscription
upgradeSubscription.directAnswer: Compare plans and upgrade under Billing → Upgrade Options. Owners and admins can initiate upgrades.
upgradeSubscription.explanation: Upgrades unlock additional capacity, Business Packs, and advanced modules according to the selected plan.
upgradeSubscription.step2: Compare plans and select the best fit.
upgradeSubscription.step3: Complete the upgrade flow and confirm billing details.

subscriptionPricing.title: Subscription pricing
subscriptionPricing.directAnswer: Published monthly prices (NOK) are listed below. Enterprise uses custom pricing through agreement.
subscriptionPricing.explanation: Prices come from the canonical Aipify public pricing catalog. Your organization's active subscription may differ based on agreement date.
subscriptionPricing.step1: Review plan options under Billing → Upgrade Options.
subscriptionPricing.step2: Open Subscription to see your current plan.
subscriptionPricing.searchTerms: hva koster|what does it cost|pricing|price|pris|abonnement kost|subscription cost

mySubscription.title: Your subscription
mySubscription.directAnswer: Your verified subscription is {planLabel} ({planKey}) with status: {status}.
mySubscription.explanation: This reflects your organization's live license data. Open Subscription for renewal dates, capacity, and billing details.
mySubscription.step1: Open Billing → Subscription for full details.
mySubscription.step2: Visit Upgrade Options if you need more capacity or modules.
mySubscription.searchTerms: hvilket abonnement|my subscription|current plan|min plan|mitt abonnement|which plan

findInvoices.title: Find invoices
findInvoices.directAnswer: Invoices are available under Billing → Invoices.
findInvoices.explanation: Download PDF invoices for accounting and records. Owners and admins have full billing access.
findInvoices.step2: Select an invoice period to view or download.
findInvoices.searchTerms: invoice|faktura|find invoice|hvor finner jeg faktura|billing invoice

findReceipts.title: Find receipts
findReceipts.directAnswer: Payment receipts and transaction history are under Billing → Payment History.
findReceipts.explanation: Receipts show completed payments. For formal invoices, use the Invoices page.
findReceipts.step2: Locate the payment and open the receipt.

connectShopify.title: Connect Shopify
connectShopify.directAnswer: Connect Shopify from Platform → Connect Integration. Owners and admins can authorize the connection.
connectShopify.explanation: Integrations start read-only until you approve expanded access. Aipify learns your store context after connection.
connectShopify.step2: Select Shopify and follow the authorization steps.

enable2fa.title: Enable two-factor authentication
enable2fa.directAnswer: Enable 2FA under Account → Security. Aipify recommends two-factor authentication for all users.
enable2fa.explanation: Two-factor authentication adds a verification step at sign-in. Recovery codes are provided during setup.
enable2fa.step3: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app and save recovery codes.

installWebApp.title: Install Aipify Web App
installWebApp.directAnswer: Install the Aipify Web App from your browser when prompted, or follow the guide in Knowledge Center.
installWebApp.explanation: The web app adds a home-screen shortcut and improved mobile experience. Supported browsers show an install prompt automatically.
installWebApp.step1: Open Aipify in Chrome, Edge, or Safari on your device.
installWebApp.step2: Accept the install prompt, or use the browser menu → Install app.
installWebApp.step3: See Knowledge Center for platform-specific instructions.
installWebApp.searchTerms: web app|install app|installer aipify|pwa|install aipify web|mobile app

contactSupport.title: Contact support
contactSupport.directAnswer: Reach Aipify support from Support → Contact Support or create a request under Support Requests.
contactSupport.explanation: Include context from Companion when escalating — your question is forwarded to help the team respond faster.
contactSupport.step2: Or create a tracked request under Support Requests.

aipifyGroupLocation.title: Aipify Group AS location
aipifyGroupLocation.directAnswer: Aipify Group AS is headquartered in Bergen, Norway. From Norway. For the world.
aipifyGroupLocation.explanation: Aipify Group AS is the parent company behind the Aipify Business Operating System (ABOS).

businessPacks.title: What is a Business Pack?
businessPacks.directAnswer: Business Packs are modular operational capabilities you activate for your organization — such as industry or function-specific modules.
businessPacks.explanation: Browse available packs under Business Packs → Available. Installed packs appear under Installed Business Packs.
businessPacks.step1: Open Business Packs → Available to browse the catalog.
businessPacks.step2: Review requirements and activate packs your plan supports.
businessPacks.searchTerms: business pack|business packs|hva er et business pack|modul|pack

sinceLastLogin.title: Since Last Login
sinceLastLogin.directAnswer: See what changed since your last visit under Intelligence → Since Last Login.
sinceLastLogin.explanation: This view summarizes notifications, activity, and items requiring attention — a calm catch-up before deep work.
sinceLastLogin.step2: Review highlighted changes and follow suggested next steps.
sinceLastLogin.searchTerms: since last login|siden sist|what happened|hva har skjedd|catch up|oppdatering

companionOverview.title: Aipify Companion
companionOverview.directAnswer: Aipify Companion is your in-portal guide — ask questions and receive direct answers with links to the right page.
companionOverview.explanation: There is one Aipify. Companion is an extension of Aipify, not a separate assistant.

commandBrief.title: Command Brief
commandBrief.directAnswer: Command Brief summarizes priorities and executive context from your Command Center.
commandBrief.explanation: Use it for a focused daily overview before operations work.
commandBrief.step1: Open Intelligence → Command Brief or the Command Center dashboard.

knowledgeCenter.title: Knowledge Center
knowledgeCenter.directAnswer: Approved guides and FAQ articles live under Support → Knowledge Center.
knowledgeCenter.explanation: Knowledge Center complements Companion with published documentation.

notificationsPreferences.title: Notification preferences
notificationsPreferences.directAnswer: Manage notification preferences under Account → Notifications and Intelligence → Notifications.
notificationsPreferences.explanation: Control channels, quiet hours, and minimum alert levels.

vacationMode.title: Vacation mode
vacationMode.directAnswer: Adjust presence and notification settings under Account → Preferences to reduce non-essential alerts during time away.
vacationMode.explanation: Vacation mode suppresses non-critical noise while keeping critical alerts available.

apiAccess.title: API access
apiAccess.directAnswer: API keys and developer access are under Platform → API Access. Owners and admins manage credentials.
apiAccess.explanation: Treat API keys as secrets. Rotate keys through Developer settings when needed.
apiAccess.step2: Create or rotate keys following your security policy.
apiAccess.searchTerms: api key|api access|developer access|api credentials|api-nøkkel admin

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.directAnswer: Sensitive actions require your approval. Review pending items in your workspace approval center when notified.
approvals.explanation: Aipify prepares actions — humans approve. Critical actions are never executed without explicit approval.
approvals.step1: Check notifications for pending approval requests.

auditGovernance.title: Audit and governance
auditGovernance.directAnswer: Organization activity and security events are visible under Organization → Activity Overview and Account → Security.
auditGovernance.explanation: Aipify maintains audit trails for trust and compliance. Platform admins see aggregates only.

languageSettings.title: Language settings
languageSettings.directAnswer: Change your language under Account → Preferences. Aipify supports English, Norwegian, Swedish, Danish, Polish, and Ukrainian.
languageSettings.explanation: Language applies across the APP portal, Companion, and notifications.
languageSettings.step1: Open Account → Preferences and select your language.

whatIsApi.title: What is an API?
whatIsApi.directAnswer: An API is a secure way for two systems to communicate with each other. Aipify can use an API to retrieve approved information from your website, online store, or administration system. Access is limited to what your organization has approved, and read-only access should be used first so Aipify can retrieve information without changing anything.
whatIsApi.explanation: APIs are the connection layer between systems — not the same as finding API keys in admin settings.
whatIsApi.searchTerms: hva er api|hva er et api|what is api|what is an api|define api|api meaning

findApiKey.title: Find your API key
findApiKey.directAnswer: API keys are under Platform → API Access. Owners and admins can view and manage credentials there.
findApiKey.explanation: Only share keys with approved systems and rotate them when access changes.
findApiKey.step2: Locate the active key or create a new one if permitted.
findApiKey.searchTerms: find api key|hvor finner jeg api-nøkkel|where is api key|api key location

createApiKey.title: Create an API key
createApiKey.directAnswer: Create or rotate API keys under Platform → API Access. Owners and admins can generate credentials following your security policy.
createApiKey.explanation: Store keys securely and revoke unused keys promptly.
createApiKey.step2: Select Create key or Rotate key.
createApiKey.step3: Copy the key once and store it in your approved secret manager.
createApiKey.searchTerms: create api key|opprette api-nøkkel|generate api key|new api key

connectSystem.title: Connect a system to Aipify
connectSystem.directAnswer: Connect customer systems from Platform → Connect Integration. Start with read-only access and approve expanded permissions when ready.
connectSystem.explanation: Aipify learns approved metadata from connected systems — humans approve activation.
connectSystem.step2: Choose your platform and complete authorization.
connectSystem.searchTerms: connect system|koble system|integrate system|tilkoble system|connect to aipify

aipifyDataAccess.title: What Aipify can access
aipifyDataAccess.directAnswer: Aipify accesses only approved metadata and operational context required for your licensed modules. Integrations start read-only, sensitive actions require approval, and your organization controls connected systems.
aipifyDataAccess.explanation: Customer data stays with the customer. Aipify stores intelligence patterns — not raw private records unless explicitly approved.
aipifyDataAccess.step1: Review connected integrations under Platform → Integrations.
aipifyDataAccess.step2: Open Account → Security for access and audit visibility.
aipifyDataAccess.searchTerms: hva får aipify tilgang|what does aipify access|data access|tilgang aipify|what can aipify see

unsupportedMetric.title: Live-mått är inte tillgängligt
unsupportedMetric.directAnswer: Den anslutna integrationen tillhandahåller inte detta operativa mått.
unsupportedMetric.explanation: Aipify svarar endast från verifierad skrivskyddad integrationsdata. Den kan inte gissa medlemsantal eller andra känsliga mått.
